properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v3 v3 v4 v4 v3 v3 v3 v3 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hallelujah, You're worthy to be praised Hallelujah, You're worthy to be praised Hallelujah, You're worthy to be praised Hallelujah, You're worthy to be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I lift my hands, I praise you Lord I bow my head, I honor you Lord I lift my hands, I praise you Lord I bow my head, I honor you Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah, You're worthy Hallelujah, we praise Your name Hallelujah, so worthy Hallelujah, Lord we lift you up

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord we lift you up Lord we lift you up Lord we lift you up
